ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'For Item Review') && ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'For Approval') && NOT( $Permission.Purchase_Request_Item_Reviewer ) && NOT(ISBLANK(New_Item_Name__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only authorised purchasing team members are allowed to mark this record For Approval from Item review.
